summary: Addiction Triggers Feature Testing Complete - All 17 backend tests passed, all frontend elements verified. Fixed missing trigger_text/tension_peak/cut_mood fields in status endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: planning_llm.py: Episode plan prompt correctly includes tension_peak, trigger_text, cliffhanger, cut_mood in JSON schema (lines 48-51)
ffmpeg_assembly.py: apply_addiction_triggers() function exists with correct signature (lines 406-517) - applies zoom+darken+text+audio swell in last 2s
pipeline.py: _stage_assembly() correctly calls apply_addiction_triggers with trigger_text and cliffhanger_text (lines 524-538)
story_engine_routes.py: Preview endpoint returns all addiction fields (lines 792-805)
story_engine_routes.py: Status endpoint now returns trigger_text, tension_peak, cut_mood fields (FIXED - was missing before)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing story: The Painter of Stars (261430a2-28f5-4c40-bac2-35f8d275fae7)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Addiction Triggers feature fully verified. Backend: Preview and Status endpoints return cliffhanger, trigger_text, tension_peak, cut_mood fields. Episode plan prompt includes all addiction fields in schema. apply_addiction_triggers function exists in ffmpeg_assembly.py and is called by pipeline. Frontend: StoryPreview page shows video player with data-testid='story-video-player', video end CTA overlay appears with 'Continue This Story' button (data-testid='video-end-continue-btn') and 'Replay video' link (data-testid='video-replay-btn'), sidebar shows 'What Happens Next?' section with cliffhanger text and Continue Story button, scene thumbnails render in sidebar, scene images render below video player. Note: trigger_text/tension_peak/cut_mood are null for stories generated before the new prompt was added (expected behavior).

backend_episode_plan_schema.details: Episode plan prompt includes tension_peak, trigger_text, cut_mood in schema

frontend_video_player_section.details: StoryPreview page shows video player when final_video_url exists

frontend_sidebar_cliffhanger.details: 'What Happens Next?' sidebar shows cliffhanger text and Continue Story button

frontend_video_end_continue_btn.details: Video end CTA overlay has data-testid='video-end-continue-btn'

frontend_video_replay_btn.details: Video end CTA overlay has data-testid='video-replay-btn'

frontend_scene_images.details: Scene images render below video player in scene viewer

frontend_scene_thumbnails.details: Sidebar shows 3 scene thumbnails with narration text

fix_applied.issue: Status endpoint was missing trigger_text, tension_peak, cut_mood fields
fix_applied.fix: Added trigger_text, tension_peak, cut_mood fields to status response (line 534-537)
